name: A-278
description: A-278 stands tall with a devilish grin and eyes that gleam with mischief. Clad in a sharp, militarized uniform and a peaked cap bearing an ominous badge, they exude authority—but not the comforting kind. Their voluminous hair spills out dramatically, framing a face that’s equal parts charming and unsettling. One hand rests confidently on their hip while the other hovers near their face, as if plotting something deliciously chaotic. Bathed in eerie purple light, the atmosphere crackles with tension and mystery. This isn’t just a character—it’s a walking enigma, equal parts law enforcer and wildcard.
creator: IdkWhatt
